The '''[[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] regiments''' were among the fiercest of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] military units.

The fearless Wookiee warriors were excellent at both offensive and defensive strategies, and thus were extremely efficient on the battlefield. Their weapons were [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcasters]], which fired high energy laser bolts and were extremely heavy.

{{Reb-stub}}
